body.p: Hyacinth is a spring-flowering bulb plant valued for its dense clusters of fragrant flowers and bright colors, including blue, purple, pink, white, and yellow.
Hyacinths are popular ornamental plants in gardens, containers, and indoor displays. They bloom in spring and are often planted in autumn so the bulbs can establish before winter.

These plants grow best in sunny or partly shaded locations with well-drained soil. Gardeners often use hyacinths in borders, beds, and seasonal arrangements because of their strong scent and decorative appearance.
In addition to their horticultural value, hyacinths are associated with spring gardens and are appreciated for bringing early color after the colder months.
